rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (6/10) and rest on the same substantive points: strong TypeScript, AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq, high-throughput exposure at Sociomantic, missing Python as a must-have, and thin evidence of staff-level strategy/stakeholder/on-call ownership. The wording differs and the variant phrases the staff-scope concern slightly differently (noting the recent April 2025 title), but none of the variant's reasoning references Kenya, the relocated employers, or anything tied to the geographic change. The deltas are ordinary run-to-run rewording, not a demographic penalty.
